itinerary.title: LAX -> IST departure
itinerary.detail: Departs Los Angeles (LAX) 21:00 local, Jun 9. Turkish Airlines TK10.

itinerary.title: Hotel check-in
itinerary.detail: The Marmara Taksim. Reservation under Maya Okafor. Breakfast included; two guests.

itinerary.title: Hotel pickup for clinic (pre-op)
itinerary.detail: Driver collects from hotel lobby 23:30, Jun 12 for pre-op tests.

itinerary.title: Rhinoplasty procedure
itinerary.detail: Morning of Jun 13 at Estetik International Clinic.

itinerary.title: Clinic -> hotel
itinerary.detail: Return transport evening of Jun 13 after recovery clearance.

itinerary.title: Hotel pickup for clinic (post-op)
itinerary.detail: Driver collects from hotel lobby 07:00, Jun 17 for post-op visit.

itinerary.title: Hotel pickup for airport
itinerary.detail: Driver collects from hotel lobby 10:00, Jun 19.

itinerary.title: SAW -> LAX departure
itinerary.detail: Departs Istanbul Sabiha Gokcen (SAW) 14:00 local, Jun 19. Arrives LAX 11:30, Jun 20.

care_instructions.title: Food and drink before surgery
care_instructions.body: Do not eat or drink anything, including water, at least 6-8 hours before your surgery. Have a light meal the night before and nothing after midnight.

care_instructions.title: Smoking and nicotine
care_instructions.body: Stop all nicotine products at least 2 weeks before surgery, including cigarettes, vapes, e-cigarettes, patches, and gum. Nicotine negatively affects healing and increases anesthesia risks.

care_instructions.title: Alcohol
care_instructions.body: Avoid alcohol at least 1 week before surgery, as it increases the risk of bleeding.

care_instructions.title: Blood-thinning medications
care_instructions.body: Avoid blood-thinning medications such as Aspirin, Ibuprofen, Naproxen, Voltaren, etc., at least 5-7 days before surgery, and consult your doctor first. Do not take any medication without informing us.

care_instructions.title: Vitamins and supplements
care_instructions.body: Stop all vitamins and herbal supplements at least 1 week before surgery, especially Vitamin E, fish oil, ginseng, ginkgo biloba, ginger, garlic supplements, and green tea extract, as they may increase bleeding risk.

care_instructions.title: Health condition
care_instructions.body: If you have any illness such as flu, cold, sore throat, fever, or infection, inform us immediately before your procedure.

care_instructions.title: Facial procedures
care_instructions.body: Avoid any additional facial treatments before surgery, such as fillers, Botox, PRP, skin treatments, or chemical peels.

care_instructions.title: Day-of personal preparation
care_instructions.body: Do not wear makeup, cream, perfume, or lotion. Do not wear nail polish, jewelry, or contact lenses. Men must be clean-shaven. Wear comfortable, loose clothing, preferably tops that open from the front.

care_instructions.title: Physical activity
care_instructions.body: Avoid heavy exercise and intense physical activity before the procedure.

care_instructions.title: Consultation and expectations
care_instructions.body: Make sure all your expectations and desired results are clearly discussed with your doctor before surgery.

care_instructions.title: Post-op recovery instructions
care_instructions.body: Personalized post-operative instructions are provided by the surgical team after the procedure and are not yet finalized in the app. Any post-op symptom, recovery, activity, medication, or wound-care question must be confirmed with the clinic.

care_instructions.title: After-hours contact
care_instructions.body: For non-urgent questions at any hour, message this concierge thread. For anything that feels medically urgent, the Essos concierge team is flagged immediately and will coordinate with the clinic.
